title: Senate Action Subcommittee
content:
{{Top|canon=Senate Action Committees}}
A '''Senate Action Subcommittee''' was a limited committee of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] established temporarily to deal with specific, limited issues.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a number of new action subcommittees were formed, each overseeing the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] direction of the war effort for various [[region]]s and [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

The [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|fall]] of the planet [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], and the revelation that the [[Senate Action Subcommittee for Corellian Trade Spine Defense]]'s corrupt [[Onaconda Farr/Legends|chairman]] had reassigned ships from Duro to [[Iseno/Legends|Iseno]] for a bribe, resulted in public outcry against the Senate. It lead for a push to restructure—and possibly dismantle—the war action subcommittees, with their powers being assigned to the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]]. Senators [[Lexi Dio/Legends|Lexi Dio]] and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] opposed this move, stating that it would place limits on the self-governance of sectors and stifle the voice of the Senate.

The [[Sector Governance Decree/Legends|Sector Governance Decree]] presumably abolished the war action committees and gave their power to the [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]].

==Appearances==
